name: Shopify Order -> Google Sheet append + Slack notification

business_intent.business_goal: Record every new Shopify order in a Google Sheet and notify the sales team in Slack.
business_intent.desired_outcome: Every new Shopify order is appended as a row in a Google Sheet and a message about the order is posted to the #sales Slack channel; if writing to the sheet fails after five retries, the team is alerted on Slack.

process_steps.action: Receive new order event from Shopify
Validate that the order payload contains required data for recording and notification (presence of order id and at least one line item)
Map/transform the Shopify order payload into a single sheet row structure
Append the transformed order row to the Google Sheet (single append operation)
Post a Slack message to #sales containing order summary for every order
If the sheet append fails, perform configured retry attempts. If retries remain, retry the append according to retry policy.
If all retries are exhausted and the write still fails, send an alert message to the #sales Slack channel describing the failure and relevant order identifiers

business_rules.description: Always notify the #sales Slack channel for every new Shopify order (regardless of sheet write outcome).

result.value: #sales: post order summary for every order

business_rules.description: If Google Sheet append fails after configured retries, alert the #sales Slack channel.

exception_rules.scenario: Google Sheet append operation fails and all retry attempts are exhausted.
exception_rules.behavior: Send an alert message to the #sales Slack channel containing the order id, timestamp, and error summary. Do not block other order processing.

retry_requirements.after_final_failure: Send alert to Slack #sales with failure details

notification_rules.condition: Every new order created (regardless of sheet write outcome)
Google Sheet append fails after retries

unknown_requirements.reason: User did not specify which Shopify order fields (which columns) to write to the Google Sheet or the sheet column order.
User did not provide the exact Slack message template or required fields to include in the Slack notification.
